'''鈭歽-y-ch''' ('''kayayach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pedantise|pedantise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-y-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pedantise|pedantise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-y-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kayayach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyayach|thiyayach]] || [[word:jiyayach|jiyayach]] || [[word:shiyayach|shiyayach]] || [[word:kiyayach|kiyayach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyayach|thuthuyayach]] || [[word:jujuyayach|jujuyayach]] || [[word:shushuyayach|shushuyayach]] || [[word:kukuyayach|kukuyayach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyayach|thuyayach]] || [[word:juyayach|juyayach]] || [[word:shuyayach|shuyayach]] || [[word:kuyayach|kuyayach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyayach|thuyayach]] || [[word:juyayach|juyayach]] || [[word:shuyayach|shuyayach]] || [[word:kuyayach|kuyayach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyayach|theyayach]] || [[word:jeyayach|jeyayach]] || [[word:sheyayach|sheyayach]] || [[word:keyayach|keyayach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyayach|thothoyayach]] || [[word:jojoyayach|jojoyayach]] || [[word:shoshoyayach|shoshoyayach]] || [[word:kokoyayach|kokoyayach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyayach|thoyayach]] || [[word:joyayach|joyayach]] || [[word:shoyayach|shoyayach]] || [[word:koyayach|koyayach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyayach|thoyayach]] || [[word:joyayach|joyayach]] || [[word:shoyayach|shoyayach]] || [[word:koyayach|koyayach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yayach|yayach]] || [[word:yayach|yayach]] || [[word:yayach|yayach]] || [[word:yayach|yayach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yayach|yayach]] || [[word:yayach|yayach]] || [[word:yayach|yayach]] || [[word:yayach|yayach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yayach|yayach]] || [[word:yayach|yayach]] || [[word:yayach|yayach]] || [[word:yayach|yayach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yayach|yayach]] || [[word:yayach|yayach]] || [[word:yayach|yayach]] || [[word:yayach|yayach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙yayach|th忙yayach]] || [[word:j忙yayach|j忙yayach]] || [[word:sh忙yayach|sh忙yayach]] || [[word:k忙yayach|k忙yayach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayayach|thathayayach]] || [[word:jajayayach|jajayayach]] || [[word:shashayayach|shashayayach]] || [[word:kakayayach|kakayayach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayayach|thayayach]] || [[word:jayayach|jayayach]] || [[word:shayayach|shayayach]] || [[word:kayayach|kayayach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayayach|thayayach]] || [[word:jayayach|jayayach]] || [[word:shayayach|shayayach]] || [[word:kayayach|kayayach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayayach|shayayach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayayach|goshayayach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayayach|gokishayayach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayayachn眉|shayayachn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayayachnkn眉|goshayayachnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayayachn眉|gokishayayachn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayayachsh毛|shayayachsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayayachnksh毛|goshayayachnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayayachsh毛|gokishayayachsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayayachro|shayayachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayayachnkro|goshayayachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayayachro|gokishayayachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayayachmu|shayayachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayayachnkmu|goshayayachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayayachmu|gokishayayachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayayachsher|shayayachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayayachnksher|goshayayachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayayachsher|gokishayayachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayayachng|shayayachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayayachnkng|goshayayachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayayachng|gokishayayachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayayachya|shayayachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayayachnkya|goshayayachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayayachya|gokishayayachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayayachyam|shayayachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayayachnkyam|goshayayachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayayachyam|gokishayayachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayayachn眉sh毛|shayayachn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayayachnkn眉sh毛|goshayayachnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayayachn眉sh毛|gokishayayachn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayayachn眉ro|shayayachn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayayachnkn眉ro|goshayayachnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayayachn眉ro|gokishayayachn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayayachn眉mu|shayayachn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayayachnkn眉mu|goshayayachnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayayachn眉mu|gokishayayachn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayayachsh毛n眉|shayayachsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayayachnksh毛n眉|goshayayachnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayayachsh毛n眉|gokishayayachsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayayachsh毛ro|shayayachsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayayachnksh毛ro|goshayayachnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayayachsh毛ro|gokishayayachsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayayachsh毛mu|shayayachsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayayachnksh毛mu|goshayayachnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayayachsh毛mu|gokishayayachsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayayachron眉|shayayachron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayayachnkron眉|goshayayachnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayayachron眉|gokishayayachron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayayachrosh毛|shayayachrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayayachnkrosh毛|goshayayachnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayayachrosh毛|gokishayayachrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayayachromu|shayayachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayayachnkromu|goshayayachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayayachromu|gokishayayachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayayachmun眉|shayayachmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayayachnkmun眉|goshayayachnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayayachmun眉|gokishayayachmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayayachmush毛|shayayachmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayayachnkmush毛|goshayayachnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayayachmush毛|gokishayayachmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayayachmuro|shayayachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayayachnkmuro|goshayayachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayayachmuro|gokishayayachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
